source_message: Oracle 06-22 NY-AM: approved MES B Inversion short after fresh MNQ+MES review. MNQ had no actual entry and stayed divergent. MES had one actual packet_ready / bestPacket entry at 10:18 ET from zone 7584-7588.25, entry 7580.5, stop 7591.75, TP1 7556.75 hit at 10:31 ET, TP2/LO.L 7552.5 touched at 10:32 ET. Pair leader was inconclusive/null, so this is an MES-specific approval from chart/fresh tape review, not a promoted pair-leader rule.

oracle_context.approval_note: User approved 2026-07-01 from fresh tape review: approve MES B Inversion short; keep MNQ as neutral no-setup pair evidence.

paired_mnq_context.fresh_fold: no setup; chain_status divergent; open reaction mss_realignment at LO.H
